Package org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5

Class Json5Parser

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.marshall.Context
org.apache.juneau.marshall.MarshallingContextable
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.Parser
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.ReaderParser
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json.JsonParser
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5.Json5Parser
All Implemented Interfaces:
JsonMetaProvider, ArrayRecordReadable, RecordReadable, TokenReadable
Direct Known Subclasses:
Json5lParser
public class Json5Parser extends JsonParser
Parses any valid JSON text into a POJO model.
Media types
Handles Content-Type types: application/json5, text/json5
Description
Identical to JsonParser but accepts JSON5 syntax (single quotes, comments, trailing commas, unquoted keys) and uses media type application/json5. Use this parser when the input may contain JSON5-style syntax.
Example input (Map of name/age):

{name:"Alice",age:30}

Complex (nested object + array):

{name:"Alice",age:30,address:{street:"123 Main St",city:"Boston",state:"MA"},tags:["a","b","c"]}

Notes:
  • This class is thread safe and reusable.
See Also:
  • JSON Basics
  • JsonParser - For strict RFC 8259 JSON only

      public Json5Parser.Builder copy()
      Description copied from class: Context
      Creates a builder from this context object.

      Builders are used to define new contexts (e.g. serializers, parsers) based on existing configurations.

    • createSession

      public Json5ParserSession.Builder createSession()
      Description copied from class: Context
      Create a session builder based on the properties defined on this context.

      Use this method for creating sessions where you want to override basic settings. Otherwise, use Context.getSession() directly.

      Overrides:
      createSession in class JsonParser
      Returns:
      A new session builder.

    • getSession

      public Json5ParserSession getSession()
      Description copied from class: Context
      Returns a session to use for this context.

      Note that subclasses may opt to return a reusable non-modifiable session.

      Overrides:
      getSession in class JsonParser
      Returns:
      A new session object.
